# Title: International selling agreements

Title: International selling agreements

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GEENGDB2JGLEK3PZ

Markdown Content:
If you use the selling services offered in Amazon’s stores listed below, you agree to each of the applicable terms with respect to your use of those services:

| Amazon store | Applicable terms |
| --- | --- |
| Australia | [Amazon Services Business Solutions Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/external/1791?language=en_AU) and [Amazon.com.au Privacy Notice](https://www.amazon.com.au/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=201909010) |
| Belgium | [Amazon Services Europe Business Solutions Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com.be/gp/help/external/help.html?itemID=201190440&language=en_GB&ref=efph_201190440_relt_521), [Amazon Payments Europe User Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com.be/gp/help/external/help.html?itemID=201190410&language=en_GB&ref=efph_201190410_cont_201190400), and [Privacy Notice](https://www.amazon.com.be/-/en/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GX7NJQ4ZB8MHFRNJ&language=en_GB) |

| Brazil | [Amazon Services Business Solutions Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com.br/gp/help/external/1791?language=pt_BR) and [Privacy Notice](https://www.amazon.com.br/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GX7NJQ4ZB8MHFRNJ) |

If you use the selling services offered in Amazon's stores in Belgium, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Spain, Sweden, Poland or the United Kingdom, see our [Amazon Payments Europe Privacy Notice](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G201190420), the [Amazon Payments UK Privacy Notice](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/GNF57C26HLS3J7HR), our [Cookies Notice](https://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/customer/display.html/?nodeId=201890250), and our [Interest-Based Ads Notice](https://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/customer/display.html/?nodeId=201909150) for more information about how we handle your personal information.

If you use the selling services in Amazon's store in Brazil, see the [Amazon Privacy Notice](https://www.amazon.com.br/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=201909010), our [Cookies Notice](https://www.amazon.com.br/cookies), and our [Interest-Based Ads Notice](https://www.amazon.com.br/gp/help/customer/display.html?ie=UTF8&nodeId=201283970&ref_=footer_iba).
